Michael Thompson
Charlotte, NC

SUMMARY
Dedicated and hardworking dock worker with over three years of experience in freight handling and logistics. Proven track record of efficiently managing loading and unloading operations while maintaining safety standards. Forklift certified with excellent physical stamina, capable of lifting heavy loads repeatedly. Strong team player with a commitment to meeting deadlines and optimizing dock operations.

EXPERIENCE
Dock Worker  
ABC Freight Services, Charlotte, NC  
March 2021 - Present  
- Operate forklifts and pallet jacks to move freight in and out of trailers and warehouses.  
- Perform quality checks on shipments and ensure proper documentation is completed.  
- Collaborate with team members to maintain a safe and organized work environment.  
- Successfully managed the loading and unloading of up to 100 shipments weekly.

Freight Handler  
XYZ Logistics, Concord, NC  
January 2020 - February 2021  
- Assisted in loading and unloading freight from trucks and containers, ensuring compliance with safety regulations.  
- Conducted routine maintenance checks on equipment and reported any issues to management.  
- Trained new employees on safe operating procedures and dock workflows.

CERTIFICATIONS  
- Forklift Operator Certification, OSHA (2020)  

SKILLS  
- Proficient in operating various types of forklifts and material handling equipment  
- Strong ability to lift heavy loads (up to 75 lbs repeatedly)  
- Excellent time management and organizational skills  
- Familiar with safety protocols and procedures in a dock environment

EDUCATION  
High School Diploma  
Charlotte High School, Charlotte, NC  
Graduated: 2019
